trackKeywordRankings: Track keyword rankings and monitor SERP position changes over time.
trackBacklinkAcquisition: Track the rate of backlink acquisition and loss over time.
monitorCompetitorRankings: Monitor competitor rankings and track their SEO strategies.
deepDiveCompetitorContent: Deep-dive competitor content analysis and keyword gap identification.
updateRefreshFrequency: Update refresh frequency and other monitoring settings.
domainsDescription: Manage domains and track their keyword rankings.
noDomainsDescription: Get started by adding your first domain to track keywords.
insightsSubtitle: AI-powered analysis of your SEO performance
insightsDescription: Aggregated intelligence from keywords, backlinks, content, and technical SEO
healthExcellent: Excellent — Your site is performing well across all metrics.
healthGood: Good — Most areas are healthy with some room for improvement.
healthFair: Fair — Several areas need attention to improve overall performance.
healthPoor: Poor — Multiple critical issues require immediate attention.
atRiskDescription: Keywords that dropped 5+ positions this week
risingDescription: Keywords that gained 5+ positions this week
nearPage1Description: Keywords on page 2 that could reach page 1
noCriticalIssues: No critical issues detected. Keep monitoring for changes.
selectAtLeastOneUrl: Please select at least one URL to scan
typeAndPressEnter: Type and press Enter to add filter...
pressEnterHint: Press Enter to add. Multiple tags use OR logic.
addKeywordsToStart: Add keywords to start tracking rankings
trackVisibilityDescription: Track keyword rankings, discover new opportunities, and monitor visibility history
monitorCompetitorOpportunities: Monitor competitor rankings and identify keyword opportunities
deepDiveAnalysisDescription: Deep-dive competitor content analysis with actionable recommendations per keyword
additionalAnalytics: Additional analytics coming soon: Recent changes, alerts, performance tables
updateSearchSettings: Update refresh frequency and search settings for {domain}
fetchCurrentRankings: Fetch current rankings and discover new keyword opportunities
letsSetUp: Let's set up monitoring for your domain
addDomainDescription: Add a new domain to track keyword rankings.
automaticKeywordDiscoveryDescription: After adding the domain, we'll automatically discover relevant keywords and fetch visibility history. This may take a few moments.
noLocationsFound: No locations found. Click refresh to load from API.
noLanguagesFound: No languages found. Click refresh to load from API.
domainLocationLanguageExists: A domain with this location and language already exists in this project
onboardingSearchingKeywords: Searching for keyword rankings for your domain...
onboardingSearchingKeywordsDesc: We're analyzing search engines to find keywords your domain already ranks for. This usually takes 15-30 seconds.
onboardingNoNewKeywordsDesc: All discovered keywords have been added to monitoring, or no rankings were found. You can add keywords manually later.
onboardingSkipAddCompetitorsLater: Skip and add competitors manually later
onboardingNoCompetitorSuggestionsDesc: We couldn't identify competitors from SERP data. You can add them manually from the domain dashboard.
onboardingFoundCompetitors: We found {count} domains competing for your keywords. Select the ones you want to track.
onboardingSetupCompleteDesc: You can run competitor analysis later from the domain dashboard. Your keywords are being monitored.
onboardingDomainFullySetup: Your domain is fully set up!
onboardingSummaryOfFindings: Here's a summary of what we found
deleteDomainDescription: This will permanently delete the domain and all associated keywords and ranking data. This action cannot be undone.
recSignificantRankingDropsDesc: {count} keywords lost 5+ positions in the last 7 days. Review content freshness and technical issues.
recSomeRankingsDecliningDesc: {count} keywords dropped positions this week. Monitor for continued decline.
recKeywordsNearPage1Desc: {count} keywords rank on page 2 (positions 11-20). Targeted optimization could push these to page 1.
recToxicBacklinksDesc: {count} backlinks have high spam scores. Consider disavowing to protect rankings.
recMinorToxicBacklinksDesc: {count} backlinks flagged. Review in Backlinks tab for potential disavow.
recLinkBuildingOpportunitiesDesc: {count} link prospects identified. Review in Link Building tab to start outreach.
recLowOnPageScoreDesc: On-page score is {score}/100. Fix critical issues in the On-Site tab.
recNoOnsiteScanDesc: Run an on-site scan to identify technical SEO issues and optimization opportunities.
recHighPriorityContentGapsDesc: {count} high-priority content gaps found. Create content targeting these keywords to capture competitor traffic.
recContentOpportunitiesAvailableDesc: {count} high-priority gaps identified. Review in Content Gaps tab.
recNoContentGapAnalysisDesc: Run content gap analysis from the Competitors tab to find keyword opportunities.
refreshLimitsDescription: Override organization-level refresh limits for this domain.
maxKeywordsHint: Maximum keywords allowed for this domain. 0 = inherit from organization.
maxDailyRefreshesHint: Maximum manual refreshes per day for this domain. 0 = inherit from organization.
businessContextDescription: This helps us generate more relevant keyword suggestions tailored to your business.
businessDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe what your business does, what products or services you offer, and what makes you unique...
targetCustomerPlaceholder: Describe your ideal customer — their role, needs, and what they're looking for...
autoGenerateSuccess: Business context generated from your website
autoGenerateFailed: Could not auto-generate — please fill in manually
aiKeywordsDescription: Generate keyword ideas based on your business context using AI.
noAIKeywordsGenerated: No keywords were generated. Try adjusting the focus or business context.
